queries.question: Show me the common type of medication for all pharmacies.
queries.sql: SELECT Medications.type  from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id   GROUP BY Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Pharmacies)

queries.question: What is the medication type for each pharmacy?
queries.sql: select pharmacies.name , medications.type from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pharmacy_medications a :Pharmacy_Medications .
  ?medications a :Medications .
  ?pharmacy_medications p:hasMedications ?medications .
  ?pharmacies a :Pharmacies .
  ?pharmacy_medications p:hasPharmacies ?pharmacies .
  ?pharmacies p:name ?name .
  ?medications p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Tell me everything about the medications that every pharmacy offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Medications.type, Medications.dosage, Medications.side_effects  from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id   GROUP BY Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Pharmacies)

queries.question: Tell me everything about the medications that every pharmacy offers.
queries.sql: select pharmacies.name , medications.type , medications.dosage , medications.side_effects from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id

queries.question: What is the medication type and dosage that is the same for every pharmacy?
queries.sql: SELECT Medications.type, Medications.dosage  from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id   GROUP BY Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Pharmacies)

queries.question: List the common medication types and side effects for all pharmacies.
queries.sql: SELECT Medications.type, Medications.side_effects  from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id   GROUP BY Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Pharmacies)

queries.sql: select pharmacies.name , medications.type , medications.dosage from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id

  ?medications p:type ?type .
  ?medications p:dosage ?dosage .
}

queries.sql: select pharmacies.name , medications.type , medications.side_effects from Pharmacy_Medications join Medications on Pharmacy_Medications.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Pharmacies on Pharmacy_Medications.pharmacy_id = Pharmacies.id

  ?pharmacy_medications p:hasMedications ?medications .

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the medication type for each pharmacy?
Give the medication type and its dosage available at each pharmacy.
Show me the types and side effects of medications that are sold in every pharmacy.
Tell me everything about the medications that every pharmacy offers.
